title: Heavy Duty Long Handle Scraper Tool – Floor & Wallpaper Removal Tool with 10 Spare Blades – Tile Adhesive Remover, Paint, Vinyl, Carpet Glue Scraper – Professional DIY Tool
features: Heavy-Duty Scraper for Tough Jobs – Built to handle the most demanding removal tasks, this long-handle scraper easily tackles wallpaper, floor tile adhesive, vinyl, carpet glue, and paint residue.
Long Reach Ergonomic Handle – Designed with a comfortable, non-slip grip and extended reach for better control and reduced strain during floor and wall scraping jobs.
Includes 10 Spare Blades – Comes with 10 high-quality replacement blades, ensuring long-lasting performance and reducing downtime during big projects.
Multi-Surface Versatility – Ideal for use on floors, walls, tiles, glass, and concrete surfaces — perfect for home renovation, remodelling, or professional contractor work.
Durable & Replaceable Blade Design – Features a sturdy metal construction with an easy blade replacement system, offering both strength and convenience for repeated use.
description: Product Description Tackle the toughest scraping jobs with ease using our Heavy Duty Long Handle Scraper Tool, designed for maximum efficiency and durability. Whether you're removing old wallpaper, stubborn floor tile adhesive, vinyl, paint, or carpet glue, this all-purpose scraper delivers professional results every time. Made with a robust metal frame and an ergonomic non-slip handle, this tool offers extended reach and superior control, minimizing fatigue during long projects. It’s the perfect companion for both DIY home renovations and professional contracting work. The scraper comes equipped with 10 spare high-strength blades, so you’ll always be prepared to keep working without interruption. The easy blade replacement mechanism makes maintenance fast and hassle-free. From floors to walls, tiles to concrete, this versatile scraper is built to perform on multiple surfaces with heavy-duty power and precision. Ideal For: Wallpaper removal Floor adhesive and tile glue removal Paint, caulk, and residue scraping Home remodeling and construction clean-up Contractors, handymen, and DIYers Built for power. Designed for control. Ready for every surface.
